roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: REPORT FROM HOMELESS PROJ, STAT OF NWH, TO SET TRIAL DATE/X: LAST DAY OF 07-30-08 IS VACATED/GTWM/X: THE NO WARRANT HOLD COURT NUMBER 2373876IS DISCHARGED,/X: DEFENSE REQUEST FOR DEFENDANTS RELEASE ON OWN RECOGNIZANCE IS GRANTED,/OR/X: AS A CONDITION OF OR DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO:/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO STAY OFF OF 300 BLOCK OF LEAVENWORTH IN THE CITY AND COUNTYOF SAN FRANCISCO,/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/DOP/NTW/LD:07-30-08/X:PD MYSLIN MADE AN ORAL 991PC MOTION,/X:COURT DENIED THE 991PC MOTION AS TO COUNTS 3 AND 7 WITHOUT PREJUDICE//X:COURT GRANTS DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO DISMISS COUNTS 1,5 & 9 CASE PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE 1385 FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON -PEOPLE NOT ABLE TO SUSTAIN THEIR BURDEN OF PROOF/X:PD MYSLIN'S ORAL MOTION FOR OR DENIED WITHOUTPREJUDICE/X:DEFENDANT REFERRED TO HOMELESS PROJECT/CONTD:STATUS OF NWH 2373876 & REPORT FROM HOMELESS PROJECT AND TO SET TRIAL DATE/DOP/X:BAIL REMAINS AT $5,000/
